description_long: This humanoid robot features a cylindrical metallic torso with a rounded dome-shaped head, giving it a friendly and approachable appearance. Its head is equipped with two circular eye-like features, suggesting basic visual sensors, and the body is marked with the text 'TEST UNIT #3157' and directional arrows. The robot has articulated arms attached at the shoulders, each ending in a three-pronged claw-like hand, and its legs are mechanical with visible joints and broad, stable feet. The surface is a matte, dark metallic color, with subtle panel lines and bolts indicating modular construction. The overall design is utilitarian, with exposed joints and mechanical details that imply functionality in urban environments.
description: A matte dark metallic humanoid robot with a cylindrical body, dome head, articulated arms, and claw-like hands, marked as 'TEST UNIT #3157'.
description_view_0: Side view showing the rounded head, cylindrical torso, articulated arm, and mechanical leg with broad foot.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the back of the dome head, cylindrical body, both arms, and mechanical legs.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the other arm, leg, and the curvature of the head and torso.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two circular eyes, 'TEST UNIT #3157' marking, both arms, and the robot's symmetrical design.
attribute_pose: Standing upright with both arms hanging down at the sides, legs straight and feet flat on the ground, head facing forward.
attribute_clothing_style: Unclothed; exterior consists of integrated metallic panels with visible bolts and markings.
attribute_facial_features: Face features two circular eye-like elements, no visible mouth or nose, and a smooth dome surface with no expressive features.
attribute_limb_articulation: Arms have visible shoulder and elbow joints, hands have three articulated prongs; legs have hip, knee, and ankle joints, all appearing as rotary or hinge types, suggesting moderate range of motion.
attribute_presence_of_sensors: Two circular eye-like features on the head likely serve as visual sensors; no other sensors visible.
